# nxos_acl_log (Data Source)

This data source can read the ACL logging configuration on NX-OS devices, including the match log level severity, log update interval, and detailed/MAC/SGT/threshold logging options.

### API Documentation

- [acllogLogCache](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Security and Policing/acllog:LogCache/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nxos_acl_log" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `detailed` (Boolean) Include detailed ACL information.
- `entries` (Number) Maximum number of flows to be monitored by logging process.
- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.
- `include_mac` (Boolean) Include Mac info in syslogs.
- `include_sgt` (Boolean) Include source group tag info in syslogs.
- `interval` (Number) Log update interval in seconds.
- `match_log_level` (Number) Acllog logging level severity.
- `threshold` (Number) Number of packets are logged before the expiry of the alert interval the system generates a Syslog message.
